category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/nurse/nkf describes nkf as Network Kanji Filter and a kanji code converter.
source_facts.description says NKF is Network Kanji code conversion Filter.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the name nkf.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains synopsis and description documentation.
Official repository includes nkf.1 manual page.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository https://github.com/nurse/nkf is the project source repository.
source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/nurse/nkf and source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: Official README describes conversion among ISO-2022-JP, Shift_JIS, EUC-JP, UTF-8, UTF-16, and UTF-32.
source_facts.description identifies Network Kanji code conversion Filter.
